initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT expense.expense_id, expense.approved
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT expense_id, expense_description, expense_date, cost, approved
FROM expense
JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT expense.expense_id, expense.approved
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT expense.expense_id, expense.expense_date, expense.approved
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT expense.approved
FROM event
JOIN budget ON event.event_id = budget.link_to_event
JOIN expense ON budget.budget_id = expense.link_to_budget
WHERE event.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND event.event_date = '2019-10-08';
